questions.question: Aroma Mission has been originally launched in which state/UT?
questions.explanation: Aroma Mission, which was started off in Jammu and Kashmir, aims to promote the cultivation of aromatic crops for the manufacture of essential oils, which are in high demand in the aroma industry. Himachal Pradesh Government is set to collaborate with the Central Government on this initiative to replicate its success seen in the Jammu and Kashmir.

questions.question: Which country has invited Prime Minister to visit as a guest at the annual Bastille Day parade?
questions.explanation: France has invited Prime Minister Narendra Modi to visit Paris as a guest at the annual Bastille Day parade in July. The Prime Minister and French President Emmanuel Macron are expected to discuss a number of major agreements including those on the Indo-Pacific region, nuclear power and defence, as the two countries mark the 25 th year of their strategic partnership.

questions.question: Which state/UT hosted the ‘5th International Conference on Disaster Resilient Infrastructure’?
questions.explanation: The 5th International Conference on Disaster Resilient Infrastructure is being organized this year in New Delhi. The theme for this event is ‘Delivering Resilient and Inclusive Infrastructure: Pathways for Risk Informed Systems, Practices and Investments’. The 50-million-dollar Infrastructure Resilience Accelerator Fund was announced last year.

questions.question: ‘Nathu La’ is a mountain pass located in which state/UT?
questions.explanation: Nathu La is a mountain pass in the Dongkya Range of the Himalayas between Tibet and the Indian states of Sikkim and West Bengal. A massive avalanche had hit the East Sikkim’s Nathu La area recently. Seven tourists were killed and a dozen injured after the avalanche.

questions.question: ‘Petroleum Planning and Analysis Cell’ functions under the aegis of which Union Ministry?

options.label: A
options.text: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy

options.label: C
options.text: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas

answer.label: C
answer.text: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas

questions.explanation: Petroleum Planning and Analysis Cell is the data backbone of the Union Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas. It recently celebrated its 22nd foundation day. After the dismantling of Administered Pricing Mechanism (APM) in petroleum sector, Oil Coordination Committee (OCC) was abolished and a new cell called Petroleum Planning & Analysis Cell (PPAC) was created effective 1st April 2002.

questions.question: Which institution released the ‘Infertility Prevalence Estimates, 1990–2021’ Report?
questions.explanation: The ‘Infertility Prevalence Estimates, 1990–2021’ report was released recently by the World Health Organization (WHO). It provides the estimates of global and regional prevalence of infertility. According to this report, around 1 in 6 people experience infertility across the world.

questions.question: What is the repo rate as of April 2023, after the Monetary Policy Committee Meeting?
questions.explanation: After raising repo rate in six consecutive policies, the Reserve Bank of India (RBI), decided to pause its rate hike cycle amid rising concerns over global financial stability. The Monetary Policy Committee decided to keep the policy repo rate unchanged at 6.5 per cent in this meeting.

questions.question: ‘Gaia Mission’, which was seen in the news, is associated with which space agency?
questions.explanation: Gaia Mission, the ESA’s project, seeks to understand the formation of the Milky Way and its present nature. With this mission’s data, the space agency has discovered a new family of black holes. These two black holes are believed to be the closest to the Earth.

questions.question: Project CAVForth is the first registered service of which country to use full-sized autonomous buses?
questions.explanation: Project CAVForth was launched in 2019 to provide fully autonomous full-sized bus service across the Forth Road Bridge. CAVForth is a joint project of various institutions and it is part funded by the UK Government’s Centre for Connected and Autonomous Vehicles. It will be the first registered service in the UK to use full-sized autonomous buses. Bus services under this project will be launched in Scotland soon.

questions.question: ‘Parambikulam Tiger Reserve’ is situated in which state/UT?
questions.explanation: Parambikulam Tiger Reserve is situated in Kerala in the Western Ghats. A Division Bench of the Kerala HC has ordered the wild elephant locally called ‘Arikompan’ to be captured, radio-collared and translocated to this protected area. The Forest department approached the Assam government to procure a Satellite Radio Collar to be attached to the wild tusker in Idukki before it is translocated from Idukki to Parambikulam.
